'https://esportes.r7.com/resizer/v2/URKFY5FRS5EVNML5LSUADIWK3U.jpg?auth=4b1a88ff866b1dc515f4cd0343225de08e2a3b39399d0517904fb6542b4d179c';\n\n let cards = [];\n let flippedCards = [];\n let matchedPairs = 0;\n let totalPairs;\n\n\n let timerInterval;\n let seconds = 0;\n let gameStarted = false;\n let boardLocked = false;\n\n function startTimer() {\n if (gameStarted && timerInterval) return;\n gameStarted = true;\n seconds = 0;\n timerDisplay.textContent = seconds;\n timerInterval = setInterval(() => {\n seconds++;\n timerDisplay.textContent = seconds;\n }, 1000);\n }\n\n function stopTimer() {\n clearInterval(timerInterval);\n timerInterval = null;\n }\n\n function initializeGame() {\n if (imageSources.length * 2 !== 40) {\n console.error(\"Error: Please provide exactly 20 unique image sources for a 40-tile game.\");\n gameBoard.innerHTML = \"
Game Configuration Error: Not enough images provided for a 4x10 grid. Please check the console.\";\n return;\n }\n totalPairs = imageSources.length;\n\n stopTimer();\n gameStarted = false;\n seconds = 0;\n matchedPairs = 0;\n flippedCards = [];\n cards = [];\n gameBoard.innerHTML = '';\n completionMessage.style.display = 'none';\n timerDisplay.textContent = seconds;\n boardLocked = false;\n\n let gameImages = [...imageSources, ...imageSources];\n shuffleArray(gameImages);\n\n gameImages.forEach(imageSrc => {\n const card = createCard(imageSrc);\n cards.push(card);\n gameBoard.appendChild(card.element);\n });\n\n startTimer();\n }\n\n function shuffleArray(array) {\n for (let i = array.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {\n const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));\n [array[i], array[j]] = [array[j], array[i]];\n }\n }\n\n function createCard(imageSrc) {\n const cardElement = document.createElement('div');\n cardElement.classList.add('card');\n cardElement.dataset.image = imageSrc;\n\n const cardFront = document.createElement('div');\n cardFront.classList.add('card-face', 'card-front');\n const frontImg = document.createElement('img');\n frontImg.src = imageSrc;\n frontImg.alt = \"Card Image\";\n cardFront.appendChild(frontImg);\n\n const cardBack = document.createElement('div');\n cardBack.classList.add('card-face', 'card-back');\n const backImg = document.createElement('img');\n backImg.src = coverImage;\n backImg.alt = \"Card Cover\";\n cardBack.appendChild(backImg);\n\n cardElement.appendChild(cardFront);\n cardElement.appendChild(cardBack);\n\n cardElement.addEventListener('click', () => handleCardClick(cardElement));\n\n return { element: cardElement, image: imageSrc, isFlipped: false, isMatched: false };\n }\n\n function handleCardClick(clickedCardElement) {\n if (boardLocked) return;\n\n const clickedCardObject = cards.find(cardObj => cardObj.element === clickedCardElement);\n\n if (!clickedCardObject || clickedCardObject.isFlipped || clickedCardObject.isMatched) {\n return;\n }\n\n flipCard(clickedCardObject);\n flippedCards.push(clickedCardObject);\n\n if (flippedCards.length === 2) {\n boardLocked = true;\n checkForMatch();\n }\n }\n\n function flipCard(cardObject) {\n cardObject.element.classList.add('flipped');\n cardObject.isFlipped = true;\n }\n\n function checkForMatch() {\n const [card1, card2] = flippedCards;\n\n if (card1.image === card2.image) {\n card1.isMatched = true;\n card2.isMatched = true;\n card1.element.classList.add('matched'); // This triggers .card.matched .card-back { opacity: 0; }\n card2.element.classList.add('matched');\n // .flipped class remains on matched cards\n matchedPairs++;\n flippedCards = [];\n boardLocked = false;\n\n if (matchedPairs === totalPairs) {\n endGame();\n }\n } else {\n setTimeout(() => {\n unflipCard(card1);\n unflipCard(card2);\n flippedCards = [];\n boardLocked = false;\n }, 1000);\n }\n }\n\n function unflipCard(cardObject) {\n if (cardObject && !cardObject.isMatched) {\n cardObject.element.classList.remove('flipped');\n cardObject.isFlipped = false;\n }\n }\n\n function endGame() {\n stopTimer();\n completionMessage.style.display = 'block';\n }\n\n document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initializeGame);\n <\/script>\n\n\n\n"},"displayProperties":{},"localEdits":{},"variants":{}}}]},{"collection":"features","type":"divider-with-title/default","props":{"collection":"features","type":"divider-with-title/default","id":"f0fYO1ptq4V9aO4","name":"Últimas","contentConfig":{"contentService":"","contentConfigValues":{},"inherit":true},"customFields":{"bottomIndent":"sm","title":"Últimas"},"displayProperties":{},"localEdits":{},"variants":{}}},{"collection":"chains","type":"latest-news","props":{"collection":"chains","type":"latest-news","id":"c0flf14gMQeQ2JE","name":"Grid
